creator: gjb@FreeBSD.org
text:
Update lang/open-cobol port: 1.0 -> 1.1

No "official" change log seem to be available.

I would urge developers using this port to test in a development environment, as this update is a major rewrite over the 1.0 version.

Fix: Patch is attached.

Tinderbox logs can be found here:
